name: ios-toolkit
description: iOS development toolkit with specialized agents for architecture, development, code review, refactoring, and testing

metadata.description: iOS development toolkit with specialized agents for architecture, development, code review, refactoring, and testing. Covers UIKit, SwiftUI, Swift Concurrency (async/await), Combine, RxSwift, Swinject DI, and patterns (MVVM, VIPER, Clean Architecture, Coordinator).
